_comment: Mutation testing over the load-bearing numeric core. Coverage says these lines RAN; mutation says the assertions actually PIN the value. Deliberately narrow: these are the formulas where a wrong number is a silent scientific error rather than a visible crash (compensated sums, quantiles, Horn slope/aspect, cut/fill integration, CRS unit factors). Widen the mutate list as the decomposition lands; do not lower the threshold to make a run pass.
_thresholds_comment: break 75 sits under the measured 87.23 so a real weakening fails while equivalent mutants do not hold the gate hostage. Some survivors here are provably EQUIVALENT, not gaps: quantile's early returns (n===1, lo===hi) and its p-clamp boundaries produce identical results through the general path, so no test can kill them. Judge a run by NEW survivors, not by chasing 100.
